\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
3D Binary Space Partitioning (BSP) utilities for triangle meshes. 

Declares a lightweight BSP tree used to spatially partition triangle meshes and perform robust point‑location queries (inside/outside) with respect to the closed surface defined by the mesh. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{Bsp3D_8h_source}{Bsp3\+D.\+h}}.
